name: traice-sdk-monorepo
description: Public SDKs and coding-agent collectors for trAIce.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @traice/protocol && npm run build --workspace @traice/sdk && npm run build --workspace @traice/collector && npm run docs:build
scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run release-notes:check && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run python:check && npm run pack:check && npm run public:verify && npm run docs:verify
scripts.pack:check: npm pack --dry-run --workspace @traice/protocol && npm pack --dry-run --workspace @traice/collector && npm pack --dry-run --workspace @traice/sdk
scripts.python:check: cd packages/python && PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -v && python3 -m compileall -q src
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @traice/protocol && npm run test --workspace @traice/collector && npm run test --workspace @traice/sdk
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @traice/protocol && npm run typecheck --workspace @traice/collector && npm run typecheck --workspace @traice/sdk && npm run typecheck --workspace @traice/docs
